title: Void Ore Miner
description: A simple void ore miner that pulls ores out of bedrock or the void
body:
**A simple void ore miner that pulls ores out of bedrock or the void**

**Requires mod for power generation**

Currently has 5 upgrades:
- Speed Upgrade (Mines faster, uses more energy)
- Energy Upgrade (Reduces energy usage)
- Fortune Upgrade
- Auto Smelt Upgrade
- Silk Touch Upgrade
